title: Israeli settlers torched West Bank mosque: Palestinian official

snapshot.title: Israeli settlers torched West Bank mosque: Palestinian official
snapshot.description: JILJILIYA, Palestinian Territories: Israeli settlers set fire to a mosque in a West Bank village on Wednesday, the local mayor said, while AFP journalists at the site saw signs of arson and vandalism. The incident comes amid an increase in attacks against Palestinian communities by settlers in the Israeli-occupied West Bank since the start of the Gaza war in 2023.
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Israeli settlers torched West Bank mosque: Palestinian official | Arab News
